name: research-person
description: Research a real person (friend or colleague) from public sources into a confidence-marked, cross-linked Obsidian People dossier.

interface.shortDescription: Research a real person (friend or colleague) from public sources into a confidence-marked, cross-linked Obsidian People dossier.
interface.longDescription: Research a real person (friend or colleague) from public sources into a confidence-marked, cross-linked Obsidian People dossier. Works best on a local machine with user-specific files and tools available.
defaultPrompt: Research the named person(s) from public sources and create or update their People note in my Obsidian vault, with confidence markers, cross-links, and a raw-research dump in agent-notes.
